hooks.command: FILE="$FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */test/fixtures/*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify test fixtures' >&2; exit 2;; */references/*.md) echo 'WARNING: Editing reference catalog -- run evals after' >&2; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac
FILE="$FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */agents/*.md|*/SKILL*.md) echo 'Reminder: Run bash skills/scaffold/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh to verify changes' >&2;; esac; exit 0
